title: Looking for Category Manager at HomeLane

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at HomeLane
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at HomeLane. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About HomeLane:
HomeLane is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeLane!
